sample_requests: Run LIANA rank_aggregate on a PBMC8k cohort grouped by bulk_labels and produce a sender x receiver dot plot
Reshape the LIANA result into a CommAnnData classified against CellChat pathways and plot a role network for ECM/Adhesion
Focus the dot plot on signals originating from CD34+ at pvalue_threshold=0.05
Compare LIANA rank_aggregate vs single-method (cellphonedb / natmi / connectome) on the same cohort
Plot a multi-condition (baseline vs stimulated) ccc_heatmap

validation_budget.skip_reason: Source-grounded via inspect.signature / inspect.getdoc and direct reads of omicverse/single/_liana.py and omicverse/pl/_ccc_heatmap.py. LIANA is an external dependency (pip install liana) whose API is documented from notebook usage. PBMC8k cohort would be the smoke target; no live smoke run executed.
